value: Incheon crowd forecast and safety-threshold dossier
Crowd-risk failure can happen when expected attendance is forecast below a formal planning threshold or egress demand is underestimated
B+ for risk mechanism; official after-action records missing
약사사 산사음악회 2025: under-1000 forecast; no safety plan; actual crowd above threshold; late deployment
영종 불꽃페스타 2025: short attractive show; severe post-event congestion; late detour guidance
Success content can still create satisfaction failure when crowd exit traffic communication and staffing are underplanned
expected attendance basis; safety plan; venue bottleneck map; traffic plan; police-fire consultation; after-action review
